TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_trakis, title = trakis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/trakis} }

S.FORM: == trakis == ana nanu ywaw pciywagun ga, skahul nha qba ki yabux hnoqil mciywaw, nanu yasa thway ru mqsuqi pintiywaw nha. Sikishnga ryax na pinyugan kwara pinqumah ru qmasuq ywaw nha, s'agal nha gaga na msbayux, ini ga sp'yuw nha qinyatanmwah prraw mciywaw. trakis hkil hiya ga, skbalay nha hkil sa.

== trakis == ana nanu ywaw pciywagun ga, skahul nha qba ki yabux hnoqil mciywaw, nanu yasa thway ru mqsuqi pintiywaw nha. Sikishnga ryax na pinyugan kwara pinqumah ru qmasuq ywaw nha, s'agal nha gaga na msbayux, ini ga sp'yuw nha qinyatanmwah prraw mciywaw. trakis hkil hiya ga, skbalay nha hkil sa.
S.PHON: == trakis~ɕ == ana nanu jwaw pʦ~ʨijwaɣun ɣa, s~ɕkaħul nħa qβa ki jaβux ħnoqil mʦ~ʨijwaw, nanu jas~ɕa tħwaj ru mqs~ɕuqi pintijwaw nħa. s~ɕikis~ɕħŋa rjax na pinjuɣan kwara pinqumaħ ru qmas~ɕuq jwaw nħa, s~ɕʔaɣal nħa ɣaɣa na ms~ɕβajux, ini ɣa s~ɕpʔjuw nħa qinjatanmwaħ prraw mʦ~ʨijwaw. trakis~ɕ ħkil ħija ɣa, s~ɕkβalaj nħa ħkil s~ɕa.
